originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <selector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <!-- Khi nút đang được chọn (active): nền xanh đậm --> <<<<<<< Updated upstream <item android:state_checked="true" android:color="#3D68E8" /> <item android:color="#F0F4FF" /> ======= <item android:state_checked="true" android:color="@color/camera_mode_primary" /> <!-- Khi không được chọn: nền trong suốt --> <item android:color="@android:color/transparent" /> >>>>>>> Stashed changes </selector>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#FDFDFD">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/galleryHeader" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="28dp" app:iconTint="#333333" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnViewModeToggle" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_gravity="end" android:layout_marginTop="-48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@drawable/ic_view_carousel" app:tint="#333333" android:padding="12dp" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnHeaderAction" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_gravity="end" android:layout_marginTop="-48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_add" app:tint="#333333" android:padding="10dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvGalleryDate" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="-30dp" android:alpha="0.6" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="Thursday, 2 Apr" android:textColor="#333333" android:textSize="18sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Fragment Container --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/galleryContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/galleryHeader" />
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar (Custom Pill) --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" app:cardCornerRadius="30dp" app:cardElevation="8dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#F0F0F0" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/tabStamp" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="50dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_tab_selected" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivTabStamp" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_stamp_24" app:tint="#333333" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTabStamp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Picture" android:textColor="#333333" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/tabBook" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="50dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivTabBook" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_book_24" app:tint="#999999" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTabBook" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Book" android:textColor="#999999" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:maxWidth="900dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:background="#FDFDFD">

<!-- Fragment Container --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/galleryContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/galleryHeader" />
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar (Custom Pill) --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" app:cardCornerRadius="30dp" app:cardElevation="8dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#F0F0F0" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/tabStamp" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="50dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_tab_selected" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivTabStamp" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_stamp_24" app:tint="#333333" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTabStamp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Picture" android:textColor="#333333" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>

<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivTabBook" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_book_24" app:tint="#999999" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTabBook" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Book" android:textColor="#999999" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/drawerLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/homeContentRoot" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:contentDescription="@null" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/photo_banner" tools:ignore="ContentDescription" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/topBar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_top_bar_margin_top" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="10dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMenu" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_top_action_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_top_action_size" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:padding="0dp" android:gravity="center" app:backgroundTint="#3B4D82" app:cornerRadius="12dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_menu_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="@dimen/home_top_action_icon_size" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/mainContent" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.86">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnStart" android:layout_width="250dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:text="@string/btn_start_decorated" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#FF99BE" app:cornerRadius="40dp" app:elevation="8dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnGallery" android:layout_width="250dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/btn_gallery" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" app:backgroundTint="#81C19B" app:cornerRadius="40dp" app:elevation="4dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAdmin" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="38dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:text="@string/admin_go_to_dashboard" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" app:icon="@drawable/ic_settings_24" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" app:backgroundTint="#40FFFFFF" app:cornerRadius="20dp" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/drawerPanel" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_nav_drawer_width" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_gravity="start" android:background="#042B66" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="28dp" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerOur" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/home_drawer_our" android:textAllCaps="true" android:textColor="#F7A9D5" android:textSize="30sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerMemories" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="1dp" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/home_drawer_memories" android:textAllCaps="true" android:textColor="#F7A9D5" android:textSize="30sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:background="#CCFFFFFF" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerShowHistory" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_item_clickable" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_grid_view_24" android:drawablePadding="8dp" android:drawableTint="#F7A9D5" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="10dp" android:text="@string/home_drawer_show_history" android:textColor="#F7A9D5" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerAdminDashboard" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_item_clickable" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_settings_24" android:drawablePadding="8dp" android:drawableTint="#F7A9D5" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="10dp" android:text="@string/admin_go_to_dashboard" android:textColor="#F7A9D5" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerMusicLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="@string/home_drawer_music" android:textColor="#F7A9D5" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/groupMusicState" android:layout_width="122dp" android:layout_height="34dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_spinner" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMusicOn" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_music_on" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#1B2559" android:textSize="11sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#00000000" app:cornerRadius="15dp" app:rippleColor="#22F7A9D5" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMusicOff" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_music_off" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#1B2559" android:textSize="11sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#00000000" app:cornerRadius="15dp" app:rippleColor="#22F7A9D5" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="7dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerLanguageLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="@string/home_drawer_language" android:textColor="#F7A9D5" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/groupLanguage" android:layout_width="122dp" android:layout_height="34dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_spinner" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnLangVi" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_switch_to_vietnamese" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#1B2559" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#00000000" app:cornerRadius="15dp" app:rippleColor="#22F7A9D5" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnLangEn" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_switch_to_english" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#1B2559" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#00000000" app:cornerRadius="15dp" app:rippleColor="#22F7A9D5" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:background="#CCFFFFFF" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnDrawerSignOut" android:layout_width="174dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp" android:text="@string/auth_sign_out" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#000000" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#F7A9D5" app:cornerRadius="24dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/drawerLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">

<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/drawerPanel" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_nav_drawer_width" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_gravity="start" android:background="#042B66" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="20dp" android:paddingTop="28dp" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerOur" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/home_drawer_our" android:textAllCaps="true" android:textColor="#F7A9D5" android:textSize="30sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerMemories" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="1dp" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/home_drawer_memories" android:textAllCaps="true" android:textColor="#F7A9D5" android:textSize="30sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:background="#CCFFFFFF" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerShowHistory" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_item_clickable" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_grid_view_24" android:drawablePadding="8dp" android:drawableTint="#F7A9D5" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="10dp" android:text="@string/home_drawer_show_history" android:textColor="#F7A9D5" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerAdminDashboard" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_item_clickable" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_settings_24" android:drawablePadding="8dp" android:drawableTint="#F7A9D5" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="10dp" android:text="@string/admin_go_to_dashboard" android:textColor="#F7A9D5" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerMusicLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="@string/home_drawer_music" android:textColor="#F7A9D5" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/groupMusicState" android:layout_width="122dp" android:layout_height="34dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_spinner" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMusicOn" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_music_on" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#1B2559" android:textSize="11sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#00000000" app:cornerRadius="15dp" app:rippleColor="#22F7A9D5" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMusicOff" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_music_off" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#1B2559" android:textSize="11sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#00000000" app:cornerRadius="15dp" app:rippleColor="#22F7A9D5" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="7dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerLanguageLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="@string/home_drawer_language" android:textColor="#F7A9D5" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/groupLanguage" android:layout_width="122dp" android:layout_height="34dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_spinner" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnLangVi" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_switch_to_vietnamese" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#1B2559" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#00000000" app:cornerRadius="15dp" app:rippleColor="#22F7A9D5" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnLangEn" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_switch_to_english" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#1B2559" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#00000000" app:cornerRadius="15dp" app:rippleColor="#22F7A9D5" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:background="#CCFFFFFF" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnDrawerSignOut" android:layout_width="174dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp" android:text="@string/auth_sign_out" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#000000" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#F7A9D5" app:cornerRadius="24dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- ── FULL SCREEN SCAN MODE (HIDDEN BY DEFAULT) ── --> <androidx.camera.view.PreviewView android:id="@+id/viewFinderFull" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:visibility="gone" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/cameraFrameOverlay" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:padding="20dp" android:src="@drawable/camera_frame" android:visibility="gone" android:elevation="50dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="4:5" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintWidth_percent="0.9" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/bgGradient" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/bg_gradient" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- ── TOP BAR (GROUPED FOR EASY HIDING) ── --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/setupControlsGroup" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/topAppBar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:title="" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_title_margin_top" android:fontFamily="@font/pacifico_regular" android:text="@string/camera_main_title" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topAppBar" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_subtitle_margin_top" android:text="@string/camera_header_subtitle" android:textColor="#1F618D" android:textSize="13sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle" />
<!-- ── PREVIEW CARD ── --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/previewCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/camera_preview_horizontal_margin" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_preview_margin_top" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/camera_preview_horizontal_margin" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="10dp" app:layout_constrainedHeight="true" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="1:1" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHeight_max="@dimen/camera_preview_max_height" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSubtitle" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/controlsBlock">
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.camera.view.PreviewView android:id="@+id/viewFinder" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCountdown" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="top|start" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:text="@string/capture_countdown_default" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="64sp" android:shadowColor="#80000000" android:shadowDx="4" android:shadowDy="4" android:shadowRadius="15" android:visibility="gone" />
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.AiOverlayView android:id="@+id/overlayView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnSwitchCamera" android:layout_width="42dp" android:layout_height="42dp" android:layout_gravity="top|end" android:layout_margin="10dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_flash_pill" android:elevation="4dp" android:padding="10dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_flip_camera" android:contentDescription="@string/camera_switch_lens" app:tint="#2A5298" /> </FrameLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- ── CONTROLS BLOCK ── --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/controlsBlock" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/camera_controls_horizontal_margin" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_controls_margin_top" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/camera_controls_horizontal_margin" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/ratioContainer" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/camera_controls_margin_bottom" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/previewCard">
<!-- Label --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" android:text="@string/main_capture_mode_label" android:textColor="#1F618D" android:textSize="11sp" android:letterSpacing="0.08" android:textStyle="bold" />
<!-- Mode toggle: Tự động / AI Detect — dạng segment rõ ràng --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/modeContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" app:singleSelection="true" app:selectionRequired="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnModeCountdown">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnModeCountdown" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/main_mode_auto" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/selector_mode_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_mode_bg" app:strokeColor="#2A5298" app:cornerRadius="10dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnModeExpression" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/main_mode_ai_detect" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/selector_mode_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_mode_bg" app:strokeColor="#2A5298" app:cornerRadius="10dp" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<!-- AI sub-toggle: Face / Gesture — chỉ hiện khi chọn AI Detect --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/aiSelectionContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:visibility="gone" app:singleSelection="true" app:selectionRequired="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnAiFace">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAiFace" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/main_mode_face" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/selector_ai_btn_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_ai_btn_bg" app:strokeColor="#1F618D" app:cornerRadius="8dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAiHand" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/main_mode_action" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/selector_ai_btn_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_ai_btn_bg" app:strokeColor="#1F618D" app:cornerRadius="8dp" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<!-- Status + Dot counter trên cùng 1 hàng --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCaptureStatus" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/capture_status_ready" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/dotContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Progress bar --> <com.google.android.material.progressindicator.LinearProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/captureProgress" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" app:indicatorColor="#2A5298" app:trackColor="#D1D9E6" app:trackThickness="4dp" app:trackCornerRadius="2dp" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- ── BOTTOM BAR ── --> <!-- Ratio toggle — căn giữa phía trên nút capture --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/ratioContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="32dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/camera_ratio_margin_top" app:singleSelection="true" app:selectionRequired="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnRatioSquare" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioSquare" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:text="@string/ratio_square" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="#2A5298" app:strokeColor="#2A5298" app:cornerRadius="8dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioWide" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:text="@string/ratio_wide" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:visibility="gone" app:strokeColor="#2A5298" app:cornerRadius="8dp" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<!-- Flash + Sound — bên phải capture --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnFlash" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/camera_side_button_margin_start" android:background="@drawable/bg_flash_pill" android:src="@drawable/ic_flash_off_24" android:contentDescription="@string/camera_flash_toggle" android:padding="11dp" app:tint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnSound" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/camera_side_button_spacing" android:background="@drawable/bg_flash_pill" android:src="@drawable/ic_sound_on" android:contentDescription="@string/main_sound_toggle" android:padding="11dp" app:tint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/btnFlash" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture" />
<!-- Capture button --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnCapture" android:layout_width="72dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/camera_capture_bottom_margin" android:background="@drawable/selector_camera_btn" android:contentDescription="@string/capture_photo" android:elevation="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<!-- Last capture thumbnail — bên trái capture --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardLastCapture" android:layout_width="52dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/camera_last_capture_margin_start" android:visibility="gone" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivLastCapturePreview" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerCrop" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<!-- Flash overlay --> <View android:id="@+id/captureFlashOverlay" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@android:color/white" android:visibility="gone" android:elevation="100dp" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">

<!-- ── PREVIEW CARD ── --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/previewCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/camera_preview_horizontal_margin" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_preview_margin_top" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/camera_preview_horizontal_margin" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="10dp" app:layout_constrainedHeight="true" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="1:1" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHeight_max="@dimen/camera_preview_max_height" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSubtitle" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/controlsBlock">
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.camera.view.PreviewView android:id="@+id/viewFinder" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCountdown" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="top|start" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:text="@string/capture_countdown_default" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="64sp" android:shadowColor="#80000000" android:shadowDx="4" android:shadowDy="4" android:shadowRadius="15" android:visibility="gone" />
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.AiOverlayView android:id="@+id/overlayView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnSwitchCamera" android:layout_width="42dp" android:layout_height="42dp" android:layout_gravity="top|end" android:layout_margin="10dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_flash_pill" android:elevation="4dp" android:padding="10dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_flip_camera" android:contentDescription="@string/camera_switch_lens" app:tint="#2A5298" /> </FrameLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- ── CONTROLS BLOCK ── --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/controlsBlock" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/camera_controls_horizontal_margin" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_controls_margin_top" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/camera_controls_horizontal_margin" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/ratioContainer" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/camera_controls_margin_bottom" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/previewCard">
<!-- Label --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" android:text="@string/main_capture_mode_label" android:textColor="#1F618D" android:textSize="11sp" android:letterSpacing="0.08" android:textStyle="bold" />
<!-- Mode toggle: Tự động / AI Detect — dạng segment rõ ràng --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/modeContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" app:singleSelection="true" app:selectionRequired="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnModeCountdown">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnModeCountdown" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/main_mode_auto" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/selector_mode_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_mode_bg" app:strokeColor="@color/camera_mode_primary" app:cornerRadius="10dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnModeExpression" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/main_mode_ai_detect" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/selector_mode_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_mode_bg" app:strokeColor="@color/camera_mode_primary" app:cornerRadius="10dp" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<!-- AI sub-toggle: Face / Gesture — chỉ hiện khi chọn AI Detect --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/aiSelectionContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:visibility="gone" app:singleSelection="true" app:selectionRequired="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnAiFace">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAiFace" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/main_mode_face" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/selector_ai_btn_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_ai_btn_bg" app:strokeColor="@color/camera_mode_primary" app:cornerRadius="8dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAiHand" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/main_mode_action" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/selector_ai_btn_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_ai_btn_bg" app:strokeColor="@color/camera_mode_primary" app:cornerRadius="8dp" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<!-- Status + Dot counter trên cùng 1 hàng --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCaptureStatus" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/capture_status_ready" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/dotContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Progress bar --> <com.google.android.material.progressindicator.LinearProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/captureProgress" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" app:indicatorColor="#2A5298" app:trackColor="#D1D9E6" app:trackThickness="4dp" app:trackCornerRadius="2dp" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- ── BOTTOM BAR ── --> <!-- Ratio toggle — căn giữa phía trên nút capture --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/ratioContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="32dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/camera_ratio_margin_top" app:singleSelection="true" app:selectionRequired="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnRatioSquare" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioSquare" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:text="@string/ratio_square" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="#2A5298" app:strokeColor="#2A5298" app:cornerRadius="8dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioWide" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:text="@string/ratio_wide" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:visibility="gone" app:strokeColor="#2A5298" app:cornerRadius="8dp" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<!-- Flash + Sound — bên phải capture --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnFlash" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/camera_side_button_margin_start" android:background="@drawable/bg_flash_pill" android:src="@drawable/ic_flash_off_24" android:contentDescription="@string/camera_flash_toggle" android:padding="11dp" app:tint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnSound" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/camera_side_button_spacing" android:background="@drawable/bg_flash_pill" android:src="@drawable/ic_sound_on" android:contentDescription="@string/main_sound_toggle" android:padding="11dp" app:tint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/btnFlash" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture" />
<!-- Capture button --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnCapture" android:layout_width="72dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/camera_capture_bottom_margin" android:background="@drawable/selector_camera_btn" android:contentDescription="@string/capture_photo" android:elevation="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<!-- Last capture thumbnail — bên trái capture --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardLastCapture" android:layout_width="52dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/camera_last_capture_margin_start" android:visibility="gone" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivLastCapturePreview" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerCrop" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<!-- Flash overlay --> <View android:id="@+id/captureFlashOverlay" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@android:color/white" android:visibility="gone" android:elevation="100dp" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- Background --> <ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/bg_gradient" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- ── TOP BAR ── --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginStart="14dp" android:layout_marginTop="40dp" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" app:backgroundTint="@color/primary_alpha_10" app:cornerRadius="22dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="22dp" app:iconTint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHome" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginEnd="14dp" android:layout_marginTop="40dp" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" app:backgroundTint="@color/primary_alpha_10" app:cornerRadius="22dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_home_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="22dp" app:iconTint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="44dp" android:fontFamily="@font/pacifico_regular" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/result_title" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:shadowColor="#FFFFFF" android:shadowRadius="8" android:shadowDx="0" android:shadowDy="0" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/btnHome" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/btnBack" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/result_subtitle" android:textColor="#1F618D" android:textSize="13sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle" />
<!-- ── RATE CARD (Bottom anchored) ── --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardRate" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="20dp" android:layout_marginEnd="20dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/pink_alpha_12" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRate" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" app:backgroundTint="#FFC311" app:cornerRadius="22dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_star_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="22dp" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/result_rate_title" android:textColor="#99265e" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_24" app:tint="#FFC107" android:layout_marginEnd="2dp"/> <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_24" app:tint="#FFC107" android:layout_marginEnd="2dp"/> <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_24" app:tint="#FFC107" android:layout_marginEnd="2dp"/> <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_24" app:tint="#FFC107" android:layout_marginEnd="2dp"/> <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_outline_24" app:tint="#ff99be"/> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="1dp" android:text="@string/result_rate_subtitle" android:textColor="#c06080" android:textSize="11sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<ImageView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_forward_24" app:tint="#c06080" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- ── ACTION BUTTONS (Above Rate Card) ── --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/llActionRow" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="14dp" android:layout_marginEnd="14dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:weightSum="3" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/cardRate" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSavePng" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:text="@string/result_save_image" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingStart="4dp" android:paddingEnd="4dp" app:backgroundTint="#31569A" app:cornerRadius="24dp" app:elevation="2dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_download_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="4dp" app:iconSize="18dp" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" app:strokeWidth="0dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnShare" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:text="@string/result_share" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingStart="4dp" android:paddingEnd="4dp" app:backgroundTint="#673AB7" app:cornerRadius="24dp" app:elevation="2dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_share_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="4dp" app:iconSize="18dp" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" app:strokeWidth="0dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNext" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:text="@string/result_save_video" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingStart="4dp" android:paddingEnd="4dp" app:backgroundTint="#ff99be" app:cornerRadius="24dp" app:elevation="2dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_videocam_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="4dp" app:iconSize="18dp" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" app:strokeWidth="0dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- ── PHOTO RESULT (Fills the remaining middle space) ── --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivFinalResult" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:scaleType="fitCenter" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/llActionRow" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSubtitle" />
<!-- ── LOADING OVERLAY ── --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/loadingOverlay" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="#88000000" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<ProgressBar android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:indeterminateTint="#FFFFFF" /> </FrameLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

<!-- Background --> <ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/bg_gradient" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- ── TOP BAR ── --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginStart="14dp" android:layout_marginTop="40dp" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" app:backgroundTint="@color/primary_alpha_10" app:cornerRadius="22dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="22dp" app:iconTint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

<!-- ── RATE CARD (Bottom anchored) ── --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardRate" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="20dp" android:layout_marginEnd="20dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/pink_alpha_12" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRate" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" app:backgroundTint="#FFC311" app:cornerRadius="22dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_star_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="22dp" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/result_rate_title" android:textColor="#99265e" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_24" app:tint="#FFC107" android:layout_marginEnd="2dp"/> <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_24" app:tint="#FFC107" android:layout_marginEnd="2dp"/> <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_24" app:tint="#FFC107" android:layout_marginEnd="2dp"/> <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_24" app:tint="#FFC107" android:layout_marginEnd="2dp"/> <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_outline_24" app:tint="#ff99be"/> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="1dp" android:text="@string/result_rate_subtitle" android:textColor="#c06080" android:textSize="11sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<ImageView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_forward_24" app:tint="#c06080" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>

<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnShare" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:text="@string/result_share" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingStart="4dp" android:paddingEnd="4dp" app:backgroundTint="#673AB7" app:cornerRadius="24dp" app:elevation="2dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_share_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="4dp" app:iconSize="18dp" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" app:strokeWidth="0dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNext" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:text="@string/result_save_video" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingStart="4dp" android:paddingEnd="4dp" app:backgroundTint="#ff99be" app:cornerRadius="24dp" app:elevation="2dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_videocam_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="4dp" app:iconSize="18dp" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" app:strokeWidth="0dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- ── PHOTO RESULT (Fills the remaining middle space) ── --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivFinalResult" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:scaleType="fitCenter" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/llActionRow" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSubtitle" />
<!-- ── LOADING OVERLAY ── --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/loadingOverlay" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="#88000000" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<ProgressBar android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:indeterminateTint="#FFFFFF" /> </FrameLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/app_bg_light">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Chart Card --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardOverviewSummary" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:visibility="gone" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="#FFFFFF" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">

<!-- Chart Bars --> <!-- 5 Stars --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBar5Label" android:layout_width="32dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_bar_five" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="#4A5D77"/> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginHorizontal="8dp" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_track"> <View android:id="@+id/bar5Star" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_fill_green"/> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv5StarCount" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="#4A5D77" android:gravity="end"/> </LinearLayout>

<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRange12m" style="?attr/materialButtonOutlinedStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="40dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_range_12m" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="13sp" />
</com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardAiRatioMini" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius_item" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="#FFFFFF" app:strokeColor="@color/admin_card_stroke" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_card_padding">
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.ui.chart.AiRatioPieChartView android:id="@+id/pieAiRatioMini" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_pie_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_pie_size" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAiRatioMiniPercent" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0%" android:textColor="#1B2A5C" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_percent_text" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintBaseline_toBaselineOf="@id/tvAiRatioMiniTitle" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_gap" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_gap" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/pieAiRatioMini" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/tvAiRatioMiniPercent" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/pieAiRatioMini" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/pieAiRatioMini">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAiRatioMiniTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="1" android:text="@string/admin_ai_pie_title" android:textColor="#1B2A5C" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_title_text" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAiRatioMiniMeta" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="1" android:text="@string/admin_ai_registered_with_count" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_meta_text" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="#FFFFFF">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUsersChartTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_users_chart_title" android:textColor="@color/app_blue" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUsersChartSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_users_chart_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" />
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.ui.chart.MonthlyBarChartView android:id="@+id/chartUsersByMonth" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="200dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:paddingBottom="4dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUsersByMonthEmpty" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_trend_empty" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="#FFFFFF">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDownloadsChartTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_download_chart_title" android:textColor="@color/app_blue" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDownloadsChartSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_download_chart_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" />
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.ui.chart.MonthlyBarChartView android:id="@+id/chartImageDownloadsByMonth" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="200dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:paddingBottom="4dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvImageDownloadsByMonthEmpty" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_trend_empty" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="#FFFFFF">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReviewScoreChartTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_review_score_chart_title" android:textColor="@color/app_blue" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReviewScoreChartSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_review_score_chart_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" />
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.ui.chart.MonthlyBarChartView android:id="@+id/chartReviewScoreByMonth" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="200dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:paddingBottom="4dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReviewScoreByMonthEmpty" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_trend_empty" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Tối ưu cho màn hình lớn: iPhone 14+ Pro Max, Samsung S24 Ultra, Tablet --> <!-- Setup Screen Optimization --> <dimen name="setup_top_action_size">56dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_top_action_margin_horizontal">24dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_top_action_margin_top">40dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_title_margin_top">32dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_subtitle_margin_top">12dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_list_margin_top">20dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_list_margin_bottom">20dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_next_width">240dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_next_height">64dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_next_margin_bottom">32dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_concept_padding_horizontal">20dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_concept_padding_top">16dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_concept_title_margin_bottom">14dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_frame_item_width">200dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_frame_item_height">240dp</dimen> <dimen name="setup_frame_item_spacing">12dp</dimen>
<!-- Camera Screen Optimization --> <dimen name="camera_title_margin_top">12dp</dimen> <dimen name="camera_subtitle_margin_top">8dp</dimen> <dimen name="camera_preview_horizontal_margin">32dp</dimen> <dimen name="camera_preview_margin_top">20dp</dimen> <dimen name="camera_preview_max_height">520dp</dimen> <dimen name="camera_controls_horizontal_margin">32dp</dimen> <dimen name="camera_controls_margin_top">16dp</dimen> <dimen name="camera_controls_margin_bottom">16dp</dimen> <dimen name="camera_ratio_margin_top">20dp</dimen> <dimen name="camera_capture_bottom_margin">32dp</dimen> <dimen name="camera_side_button_margin_start">20dp</dimen> <dimen name="camera_side_button_spacing">12dp</dimen> <dimen name="camera_last_capture_margin_start">20dp</dimen>
<!-- History Screen Optimization --> <dimen name="history_meta_text_size">18sp</dimen> <dimen name="history_submeta_text_size">15sp</dimen> <dimen name="history_pill_height">44dp</dimen>
<!-- Home Screen Optimization --> <dimen name="home_top_action_size">52dp</dimen> <dimen name="home_top_bar_margin_top">28dp</dimen> <dimen name="home_top_action_icon_size">28dp</dimen> <dimen name="home_drawer_item_icon_size">24dp</dimen> <dimen name="home_guest_cta_icon_size">20dp</dimen> <dimen name="home_guest_cta_icon_padding">8dp</dimen>
<!-- Admin Screen Optimization --> <dimen name="admin_ai_mini_card_padding">16dp</dimen> <dimen name="admin_ai_mini_pie_size">80dp</dimen> <dimen name="admin_ai_mini_gap">16dp</dimen> <dimen name="admin_ai_mini_title_text">14sp</dimen> <dimen name="admin_ai_mini_meta_text">12sp</dimen> <dimen name="admin_ai_mini_percent_text">28sp</dimen> <dimen name="admin_card_corner_radius">16dp</dimen> <dimen name="admin_card_corner_radius_item">12dp</dimen> <dimen name="admin_card_elevation">6dp</dimen> </resources>
